title.en: The lord of the Qin River gave the order.

content.en:
As time passed, more and more demon seeds rushed out of the abyss of the number one demon seed.

"Close the first line of defense!"

The lord of the Qin River gave the order.

Because a lot of demon seeds have been introduced at this time, there is no need to continue to attract them, otherwise it will also cause damage to them.

Therefore, they only need to close the first line of defense now and intercept the demon seed of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and that's it.

Then, they can destroy all the demon seeds between the first line of defense and the second line of defense, and they can complete the mission.

Bang!!!!!!

The formations of the first line of defense were all opened, and then they began to deal with those demon seeds with all their might.

Gradually, one demon seed after another will be destroyed, and the injured Eternal Dao Realm will also be withdrawn, so as to avoid more losses.

Time passes.

The number of demon seeds is getting smaller and smaller, so that the task should be completed quickly.

But that's when something happened.

......

Demon Seed No. 1 Abyss.

A demon seed with incomparably strong body strength came out of the abyss of the demon seed, and the aura of the demon seed on his body was extremely terrifying, far surpassing that of other top demon seeds.

He is one of the strongest demon 25 in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and he used to be a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, but unfortunately he accidentally turned into a demon seed, but now, his physical body is almost comparable to the powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and he has a certain weak spiritual intelligence, and can perform some special moves, although it is not as good as the Dao Seed Secret Technique, but it can also exert more powerful strength.

Soon.

This demon seed came out of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and its terrifying aura spread from the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss to the first line of defense, and many Eternal Dao Realms sensed his breath.

"It's not good, the demon seed Linyuan has come out!"

The face of the Lord of Qinhe changed.

He immediately came to the first line of defense with the other two half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses.

"How could he come out? Isn't he afraid that the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods is here, and he will directly kill him?"

The Lord of Qinhe didn't understand.

"There is only one possibility, he has a special way to sense the breath of the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods, and he knows that the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods is not here, so he dares to come out. Another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm said.

"No matter, stop him first!"

The three powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm intercepted him in unison.

Rumble!!!!!!

Demon Seed Lin Yuan made a brazen shot and punched in.

His fist carried a terrifying demon seed aura, and it became extremely large, as if it covered this void world.

Click!!!

The time and space here have collapsed, and those formations can't be intercepted, and they also begin to collapse.

The three powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm of the Qin River Country Lord all shot out to intercept and block this punch, but wisps of terrifying demon seed aura spread, and several Eternal Dao Realms were affected, and the Eternal Dao Seed was at risk of being transformed into a demon seed.

"You all withdraw, or you'll all be demonized!"

The Lord of the Qin River said.

Whew!!!

Those Eternal Dao Realms of the first line of defense withdrew one after another, and they no longer maintained the formation, after all, the formation was useless to the Demon Seed Linyuan, it was useless, and staying here would only lead to death.

So, they don't dare to stay here.

Thundered!!!!!

The three half-step Eternal Realm God Realms besieged the Demon Seed Linyuan, but they couldn't shake the other party.

"It's a little bad, the strength of the Demon Seed Linyuan is stronger than in the past!"

The Lord of the Qin River frowned.

According to this trend, the Demon Seed Linyuan really has hope of breaking through to the strength of the Eternal Realm God Realm!

"Asking for help?"

Another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse said.

"It's too late to ask for help now, my master went to a mysterious place, and if he asks for help, he won't receive it. As for asking for help from the Eternal Realm Realm, we are not in a desperate situation yet, and they will not send the strong to come. Even if a strong man is sent over, I don't know how long it will take, and it will be too late. The Lord of Qin River said.

"Then we can only block the demon seed abyss with all our strength first, let the other powerhouses kill those demon seeds, and then find a way to help us!" said another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

"That's all there is to it!"

The lord of the Qin River country responded.

......

"That's the Demon Seed Linyuan, the Lord of Qinhe doesn't seem to be able to stop it!"

He knew he had to find a way to kill all the demon seeds here, so his other replica bodies rushed over.

It didn't take long.

His replica body came, joined the battle, and with his replica body joined, the demon seeds were killed one by one.

A demon seed whose strength was comparable to that of a powerhouse of the Eternal Dao Body of the Consummation Realm was also easily besieged and killed by Ye Tian.

Time passed slowly, and the demons between the first and second lines of defense were all killed.

Immediately, the Eternal Dao Realm people watched the battle between the Qin River Realm Lord and the Demon Seed Linyuan, this level of killing, the weak were not qualified to participate at all, even the strong of the Eternal Dao Body Perfection Realm, if they participated, they would not be able to provide much help.

"I'm going to help!"

Ye Tian went up.

With his current strength, he is also comparable to a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, although it is only comparable to an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, that can also help!

With Ye Tian's participation, the pressure on the Qin River Country Lord was slightly reduced.

A replica body!

Two replica bodies!

Three replica bodies!

As soon as these 417 things came, it was six dozen and one, which directly suppressed the demon seed Linyuan.

"Great, with the addition of the Lord of the Ye Heavenly Kingdom, it is enough to suppress this demon seed Linyuan!"

However.

That's when things happened again.

Roar!!!!!

Demon Seed Lin Yuan roared, and in an instant, in the depths of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, an Eternal Demon Pillar Phantom Shadow crossed over, and was held in the hand of Demon Seed Lin Yuan, and hit the Qin River Country Lord with a fierce blow.

Among the three half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, the Qin River Country Lord was the weakest.

Under this blow, the Lord of Qinhe couldn't dodge it at all, and resisted it with all his might.

However.

The Qin River Lord's defensive Dao Secret Technique was blasted through, and the light of the Eternal Primordial Treasure on his body was also shattered, directly smashing it into the air, and his body directly hit the second line of defense.

Burst!!!!

The Lord of Qinhe kept vomiting blood, and his body continued to crack, and this time he was seriously injured.

Of course.

Demon Seed Linyuan summoned the Eternal Demon Pillar Phantom, which was not without a price, obviously they couldn't use this trick all the time, otherwise they wouldn't have to fight, and they could just escape.

"How could this be, the Demon Seed Abyss has left the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and he can still use the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar!!!!"

The Lord of Qinhe was stunned.

If they knew that the Demon Seed Lin Yuan still had this means, their plan would definitely not be like this.
